reviews.review_description: I can’t delete it and when I do it reinstalls and I don’t know how to fix it don’t be dumb stay away from the game

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback and sorry you experienced this issue. We understand how frustrating that is. I do not believe an inability to delete our app is specific to our app. Our team is investigating this. In the meantime, please contact Metaquest support. If the problem continues, email us at support@learningsurgical.com with your device/model and app version so we can help directly by making contact with Metaquest as well.

We’re sorry to hear about this. We take reports like yours seriously. I hope you will find that this is no longer the case for months. We have since made 5 updates and expanding our surgical library. Should you have any subpar experience ever, please send details (including screenshots, usernames, and time/date) to support@learningsurgical.com so our moderation team can investigate. We provide same week resolution.

reviews.review_description: WAY TO MUCH YAPPING I THOUGHT IT WAS A GAME LIKE ￼A Surgery SURGERY GAME NOT A FULL ON YAPPING I JUST WANT TO JUMP OFF A CIFF FROM THE YAPPING IF I COULD ZERO STARS￼

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback and sorry you experienced “yapping”. We understand how frustrating that is. Our team is investigating this and we’ve logged it as ticket. Unfortunately this software is not a game but an education for real surgery. In the meantime, please try our latest update that now has 5 surgeries where at the time of your feedback was none. If the problem continues, email us at support@learningsurgical.com with your device/model and app version so we can help directly. From here on out we provide quarterly updates to improve and increase our surgeries in both type and quality.
